step_by_step_thinking: \boxed{A} Based on the retrieved medical evidence, specifically referencing [article-170799_108], machine learning has indeed been applied to the prediction of suicidal behavior using large electronic health record datasets. Additionally, while not explicitly stated for MDD severity, the context implies broader application of machine learning in predicting psychiatric conditions through analytical modeling of healthcare data. Given the strong correlation between the use of machine learning in psychiatric risk prediction—including suicide—and the general trend toward leveraging AI in mental health diagnostics, it is reasonable to infer that similar methodologies have been explored for predicting severity in Major Depressive Disorder (MDD).
